description: Cancer biomarker testing results. Note that EGFR should only refer to an EGFR mutation, not estimated GFR (which is kidney function). PSA refers to prostate-specific antigen testing for prostate cancer.

items.name: Biomarker Type
items.description: Type of biomarker assay (e.g., mutation, rearrangement, expression, amplification, serum_marker)

items.name: Biomarker Result
items.description: Result of the biomarker test (e.g., positive, negative, 60%, L858R mutant, CD74-ROS1 fusion, MSI-high)
